text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After defeating many formidable opponents,
Gold Ship finally obtains the ticket to Eden, only
to find Director Akikawa waiting for her! Figures!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The truth comes out that the Book of Secrets was
a plot by Director Akikawa to keep Gold Ship
excited about racing. As for Eden, the supposed
Umamusume utopia...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The director indicates it is in fact the Twinkle
Series. In other words, Gold Ship has already
arrived. However, there is no connection between
Director Akikawa and the dreams.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just who is behind the prophetic events, then? Perhaps Gold Ship can find the answer if she keeps running down the golden path.
